title: More Bossbars
description: Adds bossbars to all the bosses in the game!
body:
This Data Pack adds bossbars (like the ones that the Ender Dragon and the Wither Boss have) to minibosses in-game.

_This datapack is being updated to modern versions and should be released between Q3 and Q4 2025_

### Minibosses included:
  - Elder Guardian
  - Warden
  - Piglin Brute

Only 1 bar can be displayed for each miniboss type at any one time. E.g., if you enter an ocean monument with 3 elder guardians, only 1 bossbar will show.
